text.title: AI-Assisted Lessons-Learned Synthesis Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: ingest-retros
step.action: Parse each retro into normalised JSON {doc_id, sections[], lines[]}. Strip PII/client names.
step.decision-gate: If < 5 retros, STOP and report skip.

step.name: cluster-themes
step.action: LLM clusters quotes by semantic similarity; emits candidate themes with quote IDs.

step.name: score-severity-recurrence
step.action: Score each theme (severity 0-3 from language, recurrence = distinct doc count); drop themes with recurrence < 2.

step.name: propose-action-items
step.action: For top-K themes (5-10) propose action items: title, owner role, deadline, success criteria.

step.name: human-edit-pass
step.action: Human validates ≥ 10 random citations against source docs; edits language; flips citation_check_passed=true.
step.decision-gate: If any citation fails verification, reject and re-run.
